scripts.check:v1: npm run check:build && npm run check:trust && npm run check:quality
scripts.check:build: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.check:quality: node scripts/check-v1-release.cjs && node scripts/check-frontend-truth.cjs && node scripts/check-ci-hardening.cjs && node scripts/check-ux-simplification.cjs && node scripts/check-ai-containment.cjs && node scripts/check-final-proof-package.cjs
scripts.check:trust: npm --prefix backend run selftest:network-engineer-trust && npm --prefix backend run selftest:scenario-matrix && npm --prefix backend run selftest:diagram-domain && npm --prefix backend run selftest:reporting-domain
